'''Vornax''' was a barren [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vornax system/Legends|Vornax system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet itself was covered in abandoned [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Factory/Legends|factories]] and piles of rusted scrap and garbage. The factories had been left disused for [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]]. The only beings who ever visited the abandoned world were those attempting to escape law, or [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] looking to collect a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]].
